methods.name: commitStakingImpact
methods.desc: Enrolls the caller in this application's AKTA soft-stake commitment.

methods.name: checkpointStakingImpact
methods.desc: Permissionlessly records a currently observed shortfall for social impact.

methods.name: stakingImpactCost
methods.desc: Returns the MBR this application must fund to create an AKTA commitment for an account.

version.desc: the current version of the contract

akitaDAO.desc: the app ID of the Akita DAO

meta.desc: A map of the meta data for each user

subscriptionStateModifier.desc: A map of how each akita subscription affects impact calculation
